format: provisional MPC3000 SND v2, mono signed 16-bit little-endian payload

segments.name: zero_guard_start
segments.description: Initial zeros to make payload start/order obvious.

segments.name: small_signed_constants
segments.description: Small values around zero, repeated to expose rounding/sign behavior.

segments.name: edge_constants
segments.description: Signed 16-bit edges and likely quantizer boundaries.

segments.name: full_signed_16_ramp
segments.description: Every possible signed 16-bit PCM value exactly once.

segments.name: left_justified_12bit_codes
segments.description: All 4096 possible signed 12-bit values represented as left-justified 16-bit PCM.

segments.name: byte_pattern_probe
segments.description: Repeated bit-pattern values to help identify byte/nibble order.

segments.name: alternating_extremes
segments.description: Alternating extremes to expose pair packing order.

segments.name: zero_guard_end
segments.description: Trailing zeros to make end alignment obvious.
